title: GD Codex Cross-Review Aggregate
description: Schema for v2 aggregate JSON produced by gd-aggregate-codex-cross-review.py. Covers 10 required roles: master_plan / up to 7 subplans / parent_close / release_evidence. Consumed by gd-validate-parent-close-gate.py --aggregate-json.

aggregate_version.description: Aggregate schema version. Must be '2.0' for v2 format.

manifest_path.description: Absolute or repo-relative path to the input manifest JSON.

manifest_hash.description: SHA-256 of the input manifest file at aggregation time.

review_contract_hash.description: SHA-256 of the combined review contract sources (commands/gd.md + prompts/gd-review-standard.md + gd-plan-review-template.md + gd-plan-review-loop-report-template.md).

stale_review_contract.description: True if review_contract_hash does not match current contract sources. Aggregate is stale — parent close gate must block APPROVED.

ambiguous_raw_result.description: True if any job has ambiguous raw result parsing (e.g. multiple JSON blocks, bare VERDICT). Parent close gate must block APPROVED.

jobs.description: One entry per manifest required_job, plus optional parent_close and release_evidence entries.

target_role.description: Semantic role: master_plan, step_N, parent_close, release_evidence.

transport_status.description: transport_ok: Codex returned real .result file. transport_failed: daemon did not return .result. wrapper_schema_fail: .result exists but bridge wrapper rejected it.

raw_result_path.description: Path to the Codex raw .result file. Null if transport_failed.

raw_result_hash.description: SHA-256 of raw_result_path content. Empty string if transport_failed.

mapped_result_path.description: Path to bridge-mapped result JSON. Null if transport_failed or wrapper_schema_fail.

codex_review_status.description: High-level Codex review outcome for this job.

gd_review_decision.description: Codex verdict extracted from raw result. 'none' if transport_failed.

codex_requires_changes.description: True if gd_review_decision is REQUIRES_CHANGES or FAILED.

missing_primary_target.description: True if primary_target file was missing at review time.

closure_eligible.description: True only if zero transport_failed, zero wrapper_schema_fail, zero missing_primary_target, zero codex_requires_changes, and review_contract not stale.

closure_blockers.description: Human-readable list of reasons why closure_eligible is false. Empty if closure_eligible is true.
